sessions.title: ConnectorVersion=0 bug diagnosis for Eliav
sessions.summary: Root-caused ConnectorVersion always-0 on GET /applications list endpoint to ToMinimalModel projection drift in ApplicationService grain state. One-line fix. Replied to Eliav, named the bug pattern (Minimal Projection Drift), added Obsidian concept notes + memory rule.
outcomes: ApplicationState.cs: ToMinimalModel omits ConnectorVersion field, defaults to 0
ToModel correctly includes it, so single-app GET works
Verdict: bug, fix is one line
Pattern named and documented for future investigations
